title: New technologies in the genomic evaluation of lymphomas.
publicationName: Polish journal of pathology : official journal of the Polish Society of Pathologists
journalName: Polish journal of pathology : official journal of the Polish Society of Pathologists
snippet: Lymphomas represent a heterogenous group of lymphoid neoplasms with a broad spectrum of clinical presentations and challenges in therapy resistance and relapse. Response to treatment and prognosis vary between and within lymphoma subtypes. The introduction of high-throughput molecular profiling methods and next-generation sequencing technolog...
